description: catwalk has come up with yet another scrumptious pair of off-duty sandals for women. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or ethnic outfits.UpperToe separator with colourful stones for added styleTransparent midfoot strapEmbossed branding on the footbedSmooth footbed for comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with a raised heelSandal CareWipe surface with a clean, dry clothDo not store in direct sunlight
